name: spend_mirror
description: plan §7 Journey D — Kabir's Spend Mirror. 14 UPI SMS (HDFC, SBI, ICICI, Axis) including a today-anomaly Zomato Rs.4500. FinanceAgent surfaces SURFACE_ANOMALY + 'Cook tomorrow?' suggestion.
